headline: Why Investors Need to Take Advantage of These 2 Computer and Technology Stocks Now

headline: Morgan Stanley Lowers its Price Target on Garmin (GRMN) to $249
summary: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) is one of the 10 Best European Stocks That Beat Earnings Estimates to Buy. On April 30, 2026, Morgan Stanley lowered its price target on Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) to $249 from $252 and maintained an Equal Weight rating. The firm said Q1 results were modestly ahead of expectations, with Fitness continuing to […]
